Access token from query string is not redacted and is potentially exposed in system logs which may be persisted.

### Details
The access token in `req.query` is not redacted when the `LOG_STYLE` is set to `raw`. If these logs are not properly sanitized or protected, an attacker with access to it can potentially gain administrative control, leading to unauthorized data access and manipulation.

### PoC
1. Set `LOG_LEVEL="raw"` in the environment.
2. Send a request with the `access_token` in the query string.
3. Notice that the `access_token` in `req.query` is not redacted.

### Impact
It impacts systems where the `LOG_STYLE` is set to `raw`. The `access_token` in the query could potentially be a long-lived static token. Users with impacted systems should rotate their static tokens if they were provided using query string.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-vw58-ph65-6rxp", "html_url": "https://github.com/directus/directus/security/advisories/GHSA-vw58-ph65-6rxp", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-vw58-ph65-6rxp"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2024-47822"}], "private_fork": null, "published_at": "2024-10-08T12:52:21Z", "publisher": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/9389634?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/br41nslug/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/br41nslug/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/br41nslug/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/br41nslug/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/br41nslug", "id": 9389634, "login": "br41nslug", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjkzODk2MzQ=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/br41nslug/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/br41nslug/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/br41nslug/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/br41nslug/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/br41nslug/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/br41nslug", "user_view_type": "public"}, "severity": "medium", "state": "published", "submission": null, "summary": "Access token from query string is inserted into logs", "updated_at": "2026-06-05T15:38:47Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/directus/directus/security-advisories/GHSA-vw58-ph65-6rxp", "vulnerabilities": [{"package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "directus"}, "patched_versions": "10.13.2, 11.1.0", "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 10.13.2, < 11.1.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Access token from query string is inserted into logs
